title: Novus Next Gen
subtitle: AI Video Platform
oneLiner: Automated AI video pipeline — GPT-4 script → Gemini TTS → Seedance video → FFmpeg stitch.
problem: A content agency needed to generate dozens of branded AI videos per week. Manual editing was a bottleneck — each video took hours.
solution: Built a fully automated pipeline: input a topic, get a finished video. GPT-4 writes the script, Gemini generates voice and stills, Seedance renders the video, FFmpeg stitches audio/video, and the result is delivered via Next.js dashboard.
impact: Reduced per-video production time from ~4 hours to ~8 minutes. Single engineer (me) delivered in 8 weeks.
highlights: Orchestrated 4 AI APIs in a single async pipeline
Built job queue with polling + webhook fallback
Docker Compose deployment on VPS with Nginx reverse proxy
Admin dashboard for batch video generation

title: Pohon Kinerja Pemda
subtitle: Performance Tree
oneLiner: Visual performance management system with hierarchical KPI trees for government employees.
problem: A regional government office tracked employee performance through scattered spreadsheets. Reporting was quarterly, manual, and impossible to audit.
solution: Built a tree-structured KPI system where managers cascade goals down to teams. Employees submit evidence, managers approve, and the system auto-calculates performance scores.
impact: Replaced 100% spreadsheet workflow. Now used by 200+ employees for monthly reporting.
highlights: Hierarchical tree data structure in PostgreSQL with closure tables
Spring Boot + JDBC Template for raw SQL control

title: Arisan Platform
subtitle: Social Savings App
oneLiner: Digital rotating savings & credit association platform with automated payment tracking.
problem: Traditional arisan (rotating savings groups) are managed via WhatsApp and paper. Disputes over payment order and balances are common.
solution: Full platform: group creation, member management, round scheduling, payment confirmation, and a transparent ledger that all members can audit.
impact: Deployed for multiple arisan groups. Zero disputes since launch — all payment history is timestamped and immutable.
highlights: NestJS with TypeORM — clean domain model for complex savings logic
Automated round-draw algorithm with audit log
Mobile-first Next.js UI — designed for non-technical users
JWT auth with refresh token rotation

title: E-Kinerja
subtitle: Jira-like PM Tool
oneLiner: Internal project management tool with Kanban boards, sprints, and time tracking for dev teams.
problem: The engineering team had no centralized way to track tasks, sprints, or who was working on what. Context was lost in Slack threads.
solution: Built a full PM tool: projects, sprints, Kanban board with drag-and-drop, task assignments, comments, time logs, and a dashboard showing team velocity.
impact: Adopted by 3 teams internally. Sprint velocity improved 30% in first quarter of use.
highlights: Go Echo for high-performance API — handles concurrent drag-drop ops
Spring Boot service for report generation and scheduled summaries
Real-time board updates via Server-Sent Events
Multi-tenant: each team has isolated workspace
